recommendations.title: Here Alone
recommendations.overview: A woman struggles to survive on her own in the wake of a mysterious epidemic, which has decimated society and forced her deep into the unforgiving wild.

recommendations.title: The Grapes of Death
recommendations.overview: A young woman discovers that the pesticide being sprayed on vineyards is turning people into murderous lunatics.

recommendations.title: The Girl by the Lake
recommendations.overview: A cop investigates the murder of a beautiful teen girl left naked by a lake.

recommendations.title: The Well
recommendations.overview: A young restorer travels to a small village to restore a medieval painting to its former glory. She will put her life in danger due to a curse attached to the painting.

recommendations.title: The Super
recommendations.overview: A man becomes the superintendent of a large New York City apartment building where people mysteriously go missing.

recommendations.title: Cargo
recommendations.overview: After being infected in the wake of a violent pandemic and with only 48 hours to live, a father struggles to find a new home for his baby daughter.

recommendations.title: Vile
recommendations.overview: A group of people awaken to find themselves prisoners in a mysterious house with no means of escape. They are each outfitted with electronic devices attached to the base of their skulls. The chemicals that the brain produces when in pain are collecte

recommendations.title: Skinamarink
recommendations.overview: Two children wake up in the middle of the night to find their father is missing, and all the windows and doors in their home have vanished.

recommendations.title: The Widow

recommendations.title: Dark Light
recommendations.overview: A woman returns to her family home and discovers it to be inhabited by monsters.
